title: Calcearia mankiensis
taxonomy: Calcearia mankiensis is classified as a species of sea snail, specifically within the family Haliidae. It belongs to the phylum Mollusca, which includes a wide range of marine animals such as oysters, clams, and squids. Calcearia mankiensis is further classified as a genus and species within the larger phylum. The classification of Calcearia mankiensis is as follows: Kingdom: Animalia, Phylum: Mollusca, Class: Monoplacophora, Order: Neomonoplacophora, Family: Haliidae, and Genus: Calcearia. This classification indicates the evolutionary relationships and taxonomic hierarchy of Calcearia mankiensis within the animal kingdom.
